item.name: Fledgling Apkallu
item.description:
Will follow you until you give him a fish. Will continue to follow you after being given a fish.

Use item to acquire the fledgling apkallu minion.
item.tooltip:
Nesting hens do not spear
a failed egg thief a score
and a half times.
  - Frandelont Raimdelle
item.specialactiondescription:
Changes action party auto-attacks to area of effect attacks.
Duration: 12s

obj.n: Out of Sight Out of Mind
